value:
I completely understand your frustration, and I apologize that you've had to repeat yourself. I can see this has already been escalated to our specialist team, and I don't want to add to that burden by asking you to go through everything again. 

Could you share the reference or ticket number from your previous contact so I can pull up your case details and follow up directly with the escalation team on your behalf? That way we can get you a resolution without you having to start over.
